notes: v0.16.52 — BOSS RUSH leaderboard now tracks one best time per (player × boss × difficulty × CLASS) instead of one row across all classes. Your 30s SHARD clear and your 1:20 BASTION clear are separate rows. ALL tab shows the best per player across classes (window function picks each player's lowest time, no matter the class). Class tabs (SHARD / BASTION / LANCE / CHORUS) only show clears done with that class — so your 1:20 BASTION clear is rank #2 under BASTION even when your 30s SHARD clear wins ALL. Class filter pushed to the server (?class= query param). Each tab has its own cache that refreshes independently after a clear. Requires backend deploy of migration 004 (alters PK to include class). Legacy class='' rows remain visible only under ALL. Windows only.
